title: The Falcon's Adventure
writer: Aubrey Wisberg, Robert E. Kent, Michael Arlen
actors: Tom Conway, Madge Meredith, Edward Brophy
plot: The Falcon rescues Louisa Braganza from kidnappers who want her father's secret formula for making diamonds. Her father's murder is pinned on the Falcon and, when he and she flee to Florida, another murder seems to confirm his guilt.
